products.title: Custom Mother's Day Digital Card
products.summary: A personalized Mother's Day card generated as a PNG after checkout, with recipient, salutation, signoff, optional photo, 21 visual styles, card formats, and text layouts.
products.description: Customize a seasonal Mother's Day card and receive a PNG download page after payment. Every style is $5, and the same download link is included in the order email.
products.delivery: PNG download page after payment, also emailed
files: Portrait, landscape, square, story, wide, or keepsake format

products.title: The Network
products.summary: A terminal-based fidget toy inspired by the machine network and YoRHa server from NieR: Automata.
products.description: The Network is currently listed as the first catalog item while the storefront is being populated. The temporary download points to the public 0.1.0 GitHub release.
